headline: FactSet (FDS) Stock Gets Fair Value Trim As Analysts Weigh Pricing Power And AI Risk
summary: Analysts have trimmed their Fair Value estimate for FactSet Research Systems from US$252.25 to US$247.50, signaling a modest reset in modeled intrinsic value. The shift aligns with recent Street commentary that weighs concerns around pricing power and AI risk alongside more constructive views on subscription trends and product positioning. As you read on, you will see how these adjustments fit into the broader analyst narrative and how to keep track as it continues to evolve. Stay updated as...

headline: FactSet Research Systems (FDS) Stock After 52% Slide Is The Market Overreacting
summary: If you are wondering whether FactSet Research Systems stock looks cheap, expensive, or somewhere in between at its current US$208.84 share price, the starting point is understanding how that number stacks up against its fundamentals. The stock has been under pressure recently, with the share price down 5.6% over the past week, 9.6% over the past month, and 26.7% year to date. This has contributed to a 51.4% decline over the last year and 45.3% and 34.5% declines over the past three and five...
